exact_content.normalization: Unicode NFKC, lowercase, then collapse all whitespace runs to one ASCII space
exact_content.tokenization_input: native raw dataset text without normalization

near_duplicate.comparison_rule: reject when set Jaccard is greater than or equal to the threshold

selection.row_consumption: a source row is consumed by one candidate only; unused tail tokens are discarded

tokenization.input_text: native raw dataset text without normalization
